code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        let a = if n < 0
          0 - n
        else
          n
        end
        if not found or a < best_abs
          best = n
          best_abs = a
          found = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
  end
when None
  ()
end
